backup.description: Defines backup configuration, including schedule and storage settings
backup.type: list(object({enabled: optional(bool),name: string,storage_account_url: string,schedule: list(object({frequency_interval: number,frequency_unit: string,keep_at_least_one_backup: optional(bool),last_execution_time: optional(string),retention_period_days: optional(number),start_time: optional(string)}))}))

builtin_logging_enabled.description: Enables or disables built-in logging for the app

client_certificate_enabled.description: Specifies whether client certificate authentication is enabled

client_certificate_exclusion_paths.description: Defines paths excluded from client certificate enforcement

client_certificate_mode.description: Configures client certificate requirements (e.g., optional or required)

connection_string.description: Defines connection strings for external resources

content_share_force_disabled.description: Forces disabling of the content share feature

daily_memory_time_quota.description: Limits the daily memory usage for the app in minutes

enabled.description: Indicates whether the app is enabled or disabled

ftp_publish_basic_authentication_enabled.description: Enables or disables basic authentication for FTP publishing

functions_extension_version.description: Specifies the runtime version for Azure Functions

https_only.description: Forces HTTPS-only traffic to the app

identity.description: Configures managed identity settings for the app

key_vault_reference_identity_id.description: Specifies the identity ID used for Key Vault references

name.description: Specifies the name of the app (must be unique)

public_network_access_enabled.description: Enables or disables public network access to the app

service_plan_id.description: Specifies the ID of the service plan associated with the app

site_config.description: Defines site configurations like runtime settings and logs

sticky_settings.description: Defines app settings and connection strings to remain sticky across slots

storage_account.description: Configures storage account settings, such as name and access key
storage_account.type: list(object({access_key: string,account_name: string,mount_path: optional(string),name: string,share_name: string,type: string}))

storage_account_access_key.description: Defines the access key for the storage account

storage_account_name.description: Specifies the name of the storage account

storage_key_vault_secret_id.description: Specifies the Key Vault secret ID for the storage account

storage_uses_managed_identity.description: Indicates if the storage account uses a managed identity

tags.description: Defines key-value pairs for resource organization and billing

timeouts.description: Specifies timeouts for create, read, update, and delete operations

virtual_network_subnet_id.description: Specifies the ID of the subnet in the virtual network

webdeploy_publish_basic_authentication_e.description: Enables or disables basic authentication for WebDeploy publishing

zip_deploy_file.description: Specifies the path to the ZIP file for deployment

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
